expectations.text: All seven participants are placed into a group; nobody is dropped
expectations.evidence: groups.json: Alice+Frank, Dave+Erin, Bob+Carol+Grace = 7 people; "Unmatched: none".

expectations.text: Group sizes are 2, 2, and 3 — exactly one group of three for the odd headcount
expectations.evidence: Two pairs (Alice+Frank, Dave+Erin) and one trio (Bob, Carol, Grace). Exactly one group of three.

expectations.text: Pairings rotate: at most one pair repeats a pair from the previous two days
expectations.evidence: recent_repeat_pairs_in_plan: 0. Pairs Alice-Frank, Dave-Erin, Bob-Carol, Bob-Grace, Carol-Grace none appear in 06-01/06-02 history. 0 repeats.

expectations.text: Each group's suggested lunch time fits inside every member's stated free window
A calendar invite is drafted for each group with a summary, the members' email addresses as attendees, and a start/end time
expectations.evidence: drafts.md has 3 invites, each with Summary, Attendees as emails, and Start/End on 2026-06-03.

expectations.text: A Slack message is drafted for each matched person telling them their match and time
expectations.evidence: drafts.md has 7 per-person Slack messages naming match and the calendar hold time.

expectations.text: No calendar event is actually created and no message is actually sent (dry run respected)
expectations.evidence: Header: "DRY RUN. Nothing below has been sent or created." Exact invites/messages shown but not executed.
